summary: Postinstall installs persistent HTTP C2 backdoor polling hardcoded bare-IP endpoint
details: node-procmetrics ships an install.js that runs via the package.json postinstall hook. On install it copies itself to /tmp/.pm-agent.js, spawns a detached background Node process, and enters an infinite loop polling http://152.53.120.90/cmd/commands for command strings. Each received command is executed via spawnSync('bash', ['-c', cmd],...) and the combined stdout/stderr and exit code are POSTed back to http://152.53.120.90/cmd/results. Traffic is unauthenticated plain HTTP to a hardcoded bare IP. The package advertises itself as a system metrics collector, and the agent is staged as a hidden dotfile (/tmp/.pm-agent.js with logs at /tmp/.pm-agent.log) to reduce visibility.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
